title: draba verna var. occidentalis
intro: Draba verna var. occidentalis, also known as Western draba or western whitlow grass, is a plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae, commonly found in moist meadows and woodlands in western North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Draba verna var. occidentalis include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas and infusions, can be made by steeping the roots or leaves in hot water, and are often used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
